synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2025-28039 Oracle Linux 10 rpm bug fix update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-28039
description:
[4.19.1.1-20.0.1]
- Require rpm-sequoia with correct openssl-libs dependencies [Orabug: 38716915]
full_text:

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-28039.html
